# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

upstreams:
  - name: user-service
    hosts:
      - host: user-service
        port: 8080
        weight: 100
  - name: order-service
    hosts:
      - host: order-service
        port: 8080
        weight: 100
  - name: product-service
    hosts:
      - host: product-service
        port: 8080
        weight: 100

routes:
  - name: user-service-route
    paths:
      - /users
    methods:
      - GET
      - POST
      - PUT
      - DELETE
    protocols:
      - http
      - https
    upstream_id: user-service
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 1000
          policy: local
      - name: key-auth
        config:
          key_in_body: false
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - "*"
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - DELETE
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Authorization
            - Content-Type
          exposed_headers:
            - Access-Control-Allow-Origin
          credentials: false
  - name: order-service-route
    paths:
      - /orders
    methods:
      - GET
      - POST
      - PUT
      - DELETE
    protocols:
      - http
      - https
    upstream_id: order-service
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 1000
          policy: local
      - name: key-auth
        config:
          key_in_body: false
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - "*"
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - DELETE
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Authorization
            - Content-Type
          exposed_headers:
            - Access-Control-Allow-Origin
          credentials: false
  - name: product-service-route
    paths:
      - /products
    methods:
      - GET
      - POST
      - PUT
      - DELETE
    protocols:
      - http
      - https
    upstream_id: product-service
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 1000
          policy: local
      - name: key-auth
        config:
          key_in_body: false
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - "*"
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - DELETE
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Authorization
            - Content-Type
          exposed_headers:
            - Access-Control-Allow-Origin
          credentials: false
